description_long: This house features a steeply pitched, asymmetrical gable roof with wooden shingles and a prominent overhang, giving it a whimsical, storybook appearance. The exterior walls are constructed from a mix of stone and timber, with visible wooden beams and a stone chimney extending from the roof. The front facade includes a covered porch with wooden railings, a balcony above, and a main entry door flanked by small windows. Barrels, crates, and greenery are placed around the base, adding rustic charm. Windows are arranged irregularly, with some set into dormers and others beneath the eaves, contributing to the house's eclectic look. The structure sits on a stone foundation with a small patch of grass and stone paving around it.
description: A whimsical, storybook-style house with a steep, asymmetrical gable roof, timber and stone walls, and a rustic porch and balcony.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, covered porch, balcony, and decorative barrels and crates.
description_view_1: Angled front-left view highlighting the steep roof, stone chimney, and the arrangement of windows and balcony.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the roof, wooden balcony railing, and minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Angled rear-right view showing the side balcony, stone base, and additional barrels and greenery.
attribute_entryway_design: Wooden door with small steps, covered porch, balcony above, and rustic decorative elements
